title: lomatium kingii var. alpinum
intro: Lomatium kingii var. alpinum, also known as Mountain Biscuitroot, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help alleviate respiratory issues, such as the common cold and flu. The health benefits of Lomatium kingii var. alpinum include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the root and seeds of the plant can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
